text: The bond between rider and dragon is one of fire and sky.
But here, on these ancient stones, that bond chills.
Skyrith's breath, once a furnace, now carries only a faint cold mist.
Kale feels it in her own heart, a slow creeping frost.
The legends whispered of this, the cold sickness, a dragon's end, written in ice, not flame.
It has found them. It has found her.
